description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open, spacious layout. The structure features extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, especially along the main living and dining areas, allowing for abundant natural light. The exterior includes a large wooden deck with outdoor seating and dining spaces, as well as a paved driveway and landscaped garden elements. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and communal living spaces, all arranged for easy access and flow. The use of clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a blend of concrete, glass, and wood materials gives the bungalow a contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes indoor-outdoor living, with seamless transitions between interior and exterior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and an expansive wooden deck. The design features open living spaces and a blend of concrete, glass, and wood materials.
description_view_0: This view highlights the open deck area, large glass windows, and the main living and dining spaces facing the outdoor patio.
description_view_1: This angle shows the paved driveway, landscaped entry, and the arrangement of bedrooms and private spaces along the side.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear of the bungalow, with visible garage space, additional outdoor seating, and more private rooms.
description_view_3: This view showcases the full width of the glass facade, the main deck, and the open-plan communal areas inside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with extensive floor-to-ceiling windows along the main facade
